RESPONDENTS' MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO BRING TO TRIAL is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring To Trial

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PLANNING DEPARTMENT OF THE CITY AND COUNTY, SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING COMMISSION, SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF, SAN FRANCISCO BUILDING INSPECTION COMMISSION, AND SAN FRANCISCO BOARD OF APPEALS' Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring To Trial.
